descriptions.pt: Encurtador de links usando React, NestJS (Express) e MongoDB (Mongoose)
descriptions.en: Link shortener using React, NestJS (Express) and MongoDB (Mongoose)
descriptions.es: Encurtador de enlaces usando React, NestJS (Express) y MongoDB (Mongoose)

descriptions.pt: Biblioteca WebAssembly (Wasm) criada em Rust para efetuar diversos cálculos relacionados à números primos (página utilizando Angular 22). Pacote npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes
descriptions.en: WebAssembly Library (Wasm) created in Rust to perform various calculations related to prime numbers (page using Angular 22). npm package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes
descriptions.es: Biblioteca WebAssembly (Wasm) creada en Rust para realizar diversos cálculos relacionados con números primos (página utilizando Angular 22). Paquete npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@caiocampos/primes

descriptions.pt: Software com login, gestão de autoridades e C.R.U.D. de entidades. Para o projeto do servidor acesse: https://github.com/caiocampos/Restaurantes
descriptions.en: Software with login, management of authorities and C.R.U.D. of entities. For server project access: https://github.com/caiocampos/Restaurantes
descriptions.es: Software con acceso, gestión de autoridades y C.R.U.D. de entidades. Para acceder al proyecto del servidor: https://github.com/caiocampos/Restaurantes
